season_spring.mood: Light, fresh, pastoral folk. Bright acoustic feel with folk instruments.

season_summer.title: Carefree
season_summer.attribution:
"Carefree" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License
http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
season_summer.mood: Bright, upbeat, happy and optimistic. Cheerful and warm summer energy.

season_autumn.title: Autumn Day
season_autumn.attribution:
"Autumn Day" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 3.0 License
http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/
season_autumn.mood: Rich, warm, calming with guitar, bass, strings, piano, and choir. Harvest and autumnal feel.

season_winter.title: Frozen Star
season_winter.attribution:
"Frozen Star" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 3.0 License
http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/
season_winter.mood: Lilting, gentle, sparse with odd chord progressions. Serene and introspective winter feel.

menu.title: Wholesome
menu.attribution:
"Wholesome" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License

menu.mood: Calm, warm, welcoming. Gentle and wholesome ambient feel, perfect for menus.

endgame.title: Celebration
endgame.attribution:

Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 3.0 License
